issues.sample: AFTER DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 1/4 MILE, THE CAR BEGAN TO PULL TO THE LEFT VERY STRONGLY; STRONG ENOUGH TO PULL ME INTO ONCOMING TRAFFIC IF IT HAD NOT BEEN SO EARLY IN THE MORNING.  I THOUGHT I HAD A FLAT TIRE BUT THE TIRE PRESSURE MONITORS SAID THE PRESSURE WAS PROPER @ 36 PSI.  TH

WHILE SLOWLY BACKING OUT OF A PARKING SPOT IN A PARKING GARAGE, THE VEHICLE AUTOMATICALLY BRAKED SO ABRUPTLY THAT I THOUGHT I HAD STRUCK SOMETHING IN THE ROADWAY. I GOT OUT TO CHECK AND THE ROADWAY WAS CLEAR. I RETURNED TO THE VEHICLE TO CONTINUE AND IT DID THE SAME THING AGAIN.

narrative.headline: What 2014 Infiniti Q50 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 169 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (46% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
